title: ‘No idea why carrier locking is still legal’: Apple just closed a money-saving iPhone loophole — but new financing plan means you can get an iPad Pro for only $36 a month
summary: If you’re still interested in getting an Apple device on finance, there’s another option, as Apple has just introduced a 36-month option when buying any of the best iPads equipped with Wi-Fi and cellular connectivity direct from Apple.
